plays.title: A Christmas Carol
plays.description: The reclamation of a tight-fisted calculator under the audit of three spirits and a chain-bound ghost.

plays.title: The Chimes
plays.description: A goblin story of bells that rang an old year out, auditing a ticket-porter's lost faith in humanity.

plays.title: The Cricket on the Hearth
plays.description: A fairy tale of home, staging the testing of a carrier's trust and the protective illusions of a poor toy-maker.

plays.title: The Battle of Life
plays.description: A love story, staging the quiet battle of self-sacrifice fought between two sisters on an ancient battlefield.

plays.title: The Haunted Man
plays.description: The ghost's bargain, staging a chemist's flight from memory and the moral infection of oblivion in a college town.

plays.title: The Pickwick Papers
plays.description: The travels of the Pickwickians, staging naive benevolence audited by a breach-of-promise suit and the Fleet Prison.

plays.title: Oliver Twist
plays.description: Staging the workhouse economy, Fagin's pickpocket academy, and Monks's plot to destroy Oliver's inheritance.

plays.title: Nicholas Nickleby
plays.description: Fortunes of a young gentleman, staging Yorkshire school economy, theatrical diversion, and Ralph's usury.

plays.title: The Old Curiosity Shop
plays.description: Pilgrimage of Nell and Grandfather, staging curiosity trade, usurious foreclosure, and country flight.

plays.title: Barnaby Rudge
plays.description: Gordon Riots of Eighty, staging locksmith duty, apprentice mutiny, and mob frenzy.
